somethin smells like maple syrup around my car after i drive it, cant find any leak tho
Smoke coming out from under the hood and the temp gauge went all the way into the red, pulled over right away.
My heater just blows cold air no matter how long I drive, started a couple weeks ago. Also had to top off the coolant tank twice.
my temp gauge sometimes reads a little high sitting in traffic but goes back to normal once I get moving. no smoke, no leaks that I can see.
little bit of white steam comes out my tailpipe on cold mornings but it goes away after a minute, no weird smell
just need a coolant flush, car runs fine, no problems
cloud of blue-gray smoke every time I floor it onto the highway, kinda smells oily, and I keep adding a quart of oil
clicking noise from the front only when I turn in parking lots, faster the tighter I go
very noticeable humming from the rear end, most noticeable 30 to 40 mph, sounds like snow tires
humming that gets louder curving left and quieter curving right, feel it in the floor on the highway
whine when accelerating that stops when I let off the gas, another shop said maybe the differential

REAR DIFF SERVICE
Was driving on the highway and the engine just shut off — had to coast to the shoulder. It sputtered for a second first. Started back up after it sat a bit.
Every time I stop at a red light the engine dies, but it fires right back up. It's worse when the AC is on and when it's hot out.
The RPMs go up and down on their own when I'm sitting at a light — the needle bounces between like 800 and 1500 and I'm not even touching the gas.
Car has no power at all — feels like the emergency brake is stuck on. It won't go over about 40 anymore and my gas mileage tanked.
Engine bucks and jerks when I press the gas, and the check engine light is flashing. Feels like it's skipping a beat.
Right after driving a while I stop for gas and it won't start back up — it cranks and cranks but won't fire. Fine the next morning though.
Cranks forever in the morning before it finally starts, then runs rough for the first minute. It's worse when it's cold out.
My check engine light came on but the car drives totally fine — no weird sounds or shaking or anything.
Dash says SERVICE ENGINE SOON, I just hit 75,000 miles and the car runs perfect.
The little wrench light came on and it says MAINT REQD — I'm right at 5,000 miles since my last oil change. Car drives perfectly, no other lights.
Car dies while I'm driving — the battery light and oil light come on right before it quits, then it restarts and they go off.
I just want to get my spark plugs replaced — they're probably due by now.
dark brown puddle under the front of my car when i park and the little red oil can light came on

puff of blue smoke out the tailpipe when i first start it in the morning, smells like burning oil, been adding a quart every few weeks too
